title: Phases
description: Array-block of planned implementation phases. Each phase carries a PHASE-NNN string id, intent, success criteria, decomposed specs, status lifecycle (planned, in-progress, completed), and dependency tracking. Replaces the file-per-phase form (integer `number` discriminator under.project/phases/) with a single.project/phases.json holding phases[].

id.description: Canonical phase id (e.g.). Replaces the integer `number` discriminator of the file-per-phase form.

goal.description: What is true after this phase that was not true before

status.description: Phase lifecycle. Intentionally divergent from pi-context://schemas/status (workflow-shaped); phases use a 3-state planning lifecycle. Reconciliation.

verify_method.description: How to verify this success criterion. Intentionally narrower subset of pi-context://schemas/verification-method (which is command/grep/ast/inspect/human/test); phases support only the 3 most common methods. Reconciliation.

status.description: Spec lifecycle. Intentionally divergent from pi-context://schemas/status (workflow-shaped); specs share the phase's 3-state planning lifecycle. Reconciliation.

dependencies.description: Phase ids (PHASE-NNN) this phase depends on. Replaces the integer-or-string mixed dependency form.

inputs.description: What this phase needs from prior phases or external sources

outputs.description: What this phase produces for later phases or users
